selection_rationale.preference_order: Within tolerance → lower fold PR-AUC std → simpler model → lower Brier

candidate.model:
RandomForestClassifier(class_weight='balanced', max_depth=10, max_features=0.4,
                       min_samples_leaf=30, n_estimators=500, n_jobs=-1,
                       random_state=42)

calibration_selection.tradeoff_note: Calibration fit on validation p_raw only. May reduce PR-AUC slightly while improving Brier/ECE for CRM risk bands.

temporal_proxy_diagnostic.limitation: Dataset has no observation date. Tenure-based split is a weak proxy only; churn labels may not align with true time-based drift.

split.threshold_fit_policy: monthly_spend_q75 and lifetime_arpu_q75 fit on train only
split.calibration_fit_policy: calibrator fit on validation p_raw only (not in this module)

churn_probability_calibrated.use: Risk bands, CRM thresholds, executive reporting

default_0.5.rationale: Standard probabilistic cutoff; not tuned for telecom FN cost.

business_min_recall_validation.rationale: Lowest validation threshold with recall>=0.75 and precision>=0.5 when feasible. Missing churners cost more than false alarms in retention.

max_f1_validation.rationale: Balanced F1 on validation — not primary for campaign ops.

top_decile_validation_score.rationale: Flag top 10% by calibrated score on validation (CRM capacity view).

ranking_vs_operating.operating_score: churn_probability_calibrated — CRM thresholds and risk bands

threshold_policy_summary.why_fn_costly: In telecom retention, a missed churner exits revenue; a false alarm wastes a save offer but keeps the subscriber.

split.threshold_fit_policy: monthly_spend_q75 and lifetime_arpu_q75 fit on train only
split.calibration_fit_policy: calibrator fit on validation p_raw only (not in this module)

selection_rationale.preference_order: Within tolerance → lower fold PR-AUC std → simpler model → lower Brier

candidate.model:
RandomForestClassifier(class_weight='balanced', max_depth=10, max_features=0.4,
                       min_samples_leaf=30, n_estimators=500, n_jobs=-1,
                       random_state=42)

calibration_selection.tradeoff_note: Calibration fit on validation p_raw only. May reduce PR-AUC slightly while improving Brier/ECE for CRM risk bands.

telecom_interpretation.stability: CV stability summary flags split-sensitive winners

warnings: Prior 18-feature champion artifacts are INVALID — retrain required.
SHAP explains base model only, not calibrator.
Temporal validation uses tenure proxy only — no observation date in data.
